repo_signals: L3 smoke for platform.cdn-edge: cache-control headers, edge functions, cache purge, origin shielding, edge vs origin split
fix a SQL deadlock in the migration

retrieval_query: cdn edge compute cache control header surrogate key edge function cloudflare worker lambda edge purge invalidation origin shield stale while revalidate

validation_smoke.name: platform.cdn-edge L3 validation smoke
signals: cache-control + surrogate keys set per response
cache hit ratio at edge meets target

diagnosis_smoke.name: platform.cdn-edge diagnosis smoke
signals: cache-control missing so edge does not cache
edge function exceeds CPU/memory limit and is killed
purge does not propagate to all PoPs
edge logic depends on filesystem/long-lived state
